label: Subject Front
description: The subject property is a single-story commercial retail building featuring a tan brick veneer exterior and a multi-level hipped roof with brown asphalt shingles. The building appears to be in average condition, with a prominent front entrance, a wooden bench, and several storefront windows, situated on a large, level gravel lot with mature trees at the property boundary.

improvements_observed.parking: Gravel lot with space for approximately 10+ vehicles
improvements_observed.landscaping: Mature trees and minimal lawn area
